abilities.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. CARDNAME deals damage to you equal to the number of cards revealed this way.

effect.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. CARDNAME deals damage to you equal to the number of cards revealed this way.
effect.name: DigUntil
